title: Spicy Malaysian Noodle Bowl
description: A flavorful and spicy noodle dish inspired by the flavors of Malaysia. Perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions.
Heat the oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chili paste and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the soy sauce and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the bean sprouts and carrots, and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Add the glistening and dehydrated ingredients if using.
Serve hot and garnish with sliced green onions if desired.
